patch.value:
## Scope

This item records the final continuation pass requested for pm-changelog after the initial release-readiness work. It covers local release gates, independent install verification, pm governance validation, GitHub release/repository verification, and npm publication status.

## Constraints

The package can be validated, committed, pushed, and released on GitHub from this machine. npm publication requires npm registry credentials authorized to create or publish the unscoped pm-changelog package name.
Final release verification and npm publication audit

Continue the pm-changelog production-readiness pass by rerunning release gates, temp-folder install verification, strict pm validation, GitHub release checks, changelog self-generation, git commit/push state, and npm publication/auth status.

- npm run release:check passes after final changelog generation.
- Clean temporary project verifies local package install and changelog generation.
- pm validate has no file-link warnings for source files after governance links are updated.
- GitHub repository and release v0.1.0 are verified with gh.
- npm registry auth and package visibility are checked and the publication blocker is updated if auth is still unavailable.
- All intentional changes are committed and pushed, or the remaining external blocker is documented.

value.author: codex
value.text: Continuation pass started after confirming main is clean and GitHub release v0.1.0 already exists.

value.author: codex
value.text: Release gates must be rerun after final changelog regeneration because closing this item intentionally changes tracker input.

value.author: codex
value.text: Strict Chore creation in this pm project requires assignee,body,comment,dep,learning,message,and note at creation time.

value.note: standalone CLI entrypoint covered by final verification
pm extension command runtime covered by final verification
public API export surface covered by final verification
public TypeScript types covered by final verification

value.command: tempdir pm init && pm install local package && pm changelog generate

value.author: codex
value.text: npm publish --dry-run can pass without auth,but real npm publish still requires npm login or an authorized automation token before package upload.

value.author: codex
value.text: Using pm --path changes tracker root,not shell cwd for extension output paths; temp verification should pass an absolute output path or run from the temp directory.

value.author: codex
value.text: author=codex,created_at=now,text=Release gate passed with 16 tests, production audit found 0 vulnerabilities, npm pack dry-run produced a 25-file package, and changelog:check was current before final governance closure.

value.author: codex
value.text: Temp smoke rerun used explicit output /tmp/pm-changelog-final-AMwXqp/CHANGELOG.md and verified the generated markdown contains Ship final changelog smoke.

patch.value: Final verification passed for release gates, strict pm validation, GitHub release metadata, and clean temp-folder local package install. npm publication remains externally blocked because this shell has no npm registry authentication and no npm token environment variables.
All local and GitHub-controlled release checks pass; npm publication completes only when valid npm registry credentials are configured.

npm run release:check passed; pm validate returned ok=true with zero warnings; clean temp project /tmp/pm-changelog-final-AMwXqp installed the local package and generated a changelog containing the smoke item; gh release v0.1.0 is public and non-draft; npm publish --access public failed with ENEEDAUTH.

author: codex

patch.value: Final verification is complete for all locally controllable release readiness work; npm publication remains blocked by missing registry authentication and is documented in pmc-ek6t.

message: Close final verification after evidence capture
